globalNews.title: Suspect charged with attempted assassination of Trump at Washington dinner
globalNews.summary: Investigators say the 31-year-old California man wanted to kill as many high-level officials as possible.

globalNews.title: US political violence generates a familiar cycle - this time it's in overdrive
globalNews.summary: In modern America, it seems violence of this kind has become an ever-present storm that can strike anywhere and at any moment.

globalNews.title: Jimmy Kimmel rejects White House criticism over Melania widow joke
globalNews.summary: In a parody aired days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner, Kimmel called Melania an "expectant widow".

globalNews.title: Russian superyacht sails through Strait of Hormuz despite blockade
globalNews.summary: The 141m-long vessel, linked to a close ally of Russian President Vladimir Putin, cleared the waterway despite an ongoing blockade.

globalNews.title: United Arab Emirates to quit oil cartel Opec
globalNews.summary: The UAE leaving Opec is seen as a major blow and potential death knell for the oil cartel.

cryptoNews.title: Crypto projects shut down as token models fail under pressure
cryptoNews.summary: Crypto projects are shutting down as token funding weakens and fragmented structures leave them with limited options to restructure or recover.

cryptoNews.title: Japan tells real estate and crypto sectors to tighten AML checks on property deals
cryptoNews.summary: Four Japanese government agencies have warned against the AML risks posed by crypto in real estate transactions, instructing industry bodies to enforce stricter compliance.

cryptoNews.title: Stablecoin payroll gets built-in yield with Paxos–Toku integration
cryptoNews.summary: The integration lets employees earn yield on stablecoin-paid salaries without moving funds or giving up custody.

cryptoNews.title: Aave-linked DeFi United unveils rsETH recovery plan after $293M Kelp exploit
cryptoNews.summary: DeFi United published a technical plan to restore rsETH backing and unwind attacker-linked DeFi positions after the $293 million Kelp exploit.

cryptoNews.title: Startale to add Privacy Boost transfers to Sony-linked Soneium app
cryptoNews.summary: Startale plans to integrate Sunnyside Labs’ Privacy Boost into its Soneium app, adding private transfers with audit-friendly compliance controls.

aiNews.title: YouTube is testing an AI-powered search feature that shows guided answers
aiNews.summary: YouTube is rolling out the new AI search feature to Premium subscribers in the U.S. on an opt-in basis.

aiNews.title: BCI startup Neurable looks to license its ‘mind-reading’ tech for consumer wearables
aiNews.summary: The startup specializes in "non-invasive" "mind-reading" tech—a kind of neural data collection that, its CEO hopes, will have all sorts of consumer applications.

aiNews.title: Red Hat’s OpenClaw maintainer just made enterprise Claw deployments a lot safer
aiNews.summary: Tank OS puts OpenClaw AI agents into a container that let's it run reliably and more safely, especially for those running fleets of them.

aiNews.title: Otter’s new feature lets users search across their enterprise tools
aiNews.summary: Otter is also releasing a new Windows app that can capture meeting notes without joining one

aiNews.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
aiNews.summary: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft gets more cash in a revenue-share agreement.
